title: Staff Reports
summary: This is a New York Fed research listing page indexing Staff Reports and Research Papers from 1995-2017, not a single archiveable document. The page provides browse access to technical working papers on topics including Treasury market liquidity, network contagion, monetary policy, and household debt. No specific paper is presented in detail.
key_points: Source is a listing/navigation page (listing_page), not an individual research document, and thus non-archiveable as a single record.
Papers listed span from 1995 to 2017, with the most recent batch being 2017 Staff Reports.

Some indexed papers touch on market structure topics: Treasury market liquidity index (SR 827), empirical network contagion (SR 826), Treasury Market Practices Group history (SR 823), and money market fund industry (SR 817).
No single publication date, author detail, or specific finding is presented in the page content.
The actual research papers would need to be accessed individually to be properly archived.
why_it_matters: This source provides no specific market structure or macro catalyst information. It is merely an index to historical research papers. Individual Staff Reports with market-structure-relevant content (e.g., SR 827 Treasury liquidity index, SR 826 network contagion, SR 817 money market fund regulation) must be accessed and archived separately.
market_structure_context: The page references potentially market-structure-relevant papers but these are just titles in an index, not actual research findings. Individual papers should be retrieved directly from the New York Fed Staff Reports archive for proper archival.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type, violating CORE RULE #5 which requires rejection of listing pages

event_type set to 'unknown' is correct since listing pages cannot be assigned a meaningful event type
